design_philosophy: A clean, modern, and trustworthy school landing page inspired by government/school CMS standards, but elevated with 2026 UI trends. It uses a strong Navy Blue palette representing formal education, paired with generous spacing, bento-grid layouts, and clear information hierarchy. It strictly avoids generic purple gradients and instead relies on crisp typography, solid colors, and high-quality imagery to build trust.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-bold text-slate-900

components.buttons: Use Shadcn Button. Primary: bg-[#1E3A8A] text-white hover:bg-[#1E40AF] rounded-lg. Accent: bg-[#F59E0B] text-white hover:bg-[#D97706] rounded-lg. Outline: border-2 border-[#1E3A8A] text-[#1E3A8A] hover:bg-[#EFF6FF].
components.cards: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200
components.tabs: Shadcn Tabs. Styled clearly with active state having a navy blue bottom border or pill background.
components.icons: lucide-react, size appropriately (e.g., w-6 h-6 for standard, w-8 h-8 for featured icons), color: text-[#1E3A8A]

sections.name: Navbar
sections.details: Sticky top, glassmorphism `bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-200`. Logo on left. Navigation links center (Profil, Informasi, Galeri, Interaksi). 'Daftar PPDB' CTA button on right. Mobile hamburger menu.

sections.name: Hero Banner
sections.details: Full width relative container (h-[80vh] min-h-[600px]). Background image of school building with `bg-slate-900/60` dark overlay for contrast. Center-aligned text. H1: 'Selamat Datang di SMP Negeri 4 Kadupandak'. Subtitle describing the school's mission. Two buttons: 'PPDB Online' (Accent color) and 'Profil Sekolah' (White outline).

sections.name: Quick Info Grid
sections.details: Bento-style grid overlapping the bottom of the hero section or immediately below. 6-8 items: Layanan, PPDB, Agenda, Bank Data, Pegawai, Struktur, Visi Misi. Each item is a clickable card with an icon, title, and subtle hover effect (`hover:-translate-y-1`).

sections.name: Sambutan Kepala Sekolah
sections.details: Split layout (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2). Left: Professional portrait of Kepala Sekolah in a rounded rectangle with subtle decorative background shape. Right: 'Sambutan Kepala Sekolah' heading, name 'Bapak Kepala Sekolah, S.Pd', and quote/message.

sections.name: Stats Counter (Mengapa Memilih Kami)
sections.details: Full-width section with Navy Blue background (`bg-[#1E3A8A]`). 4 columns: Jumlah Siswa, Guru & Staf, Kelas, Prestasi. Large numbers in Accent/White color, descriptive text below. Use lucide icons.

sections.name: News & Updates (Berita)
sections.details: 3-column grid of news cards. Each card has an image on top with an absolute positioned Date Badge (e.g., '25 Mar' in a white box) overlapping the image corner. Title, short excerpt, and 'Baca Selengkapnya' link.

sections.name: Tabs Section (Keunggulan, Penghargaan, Legalitas, Ekstrakurikuler)
sections.details: Using Shadcn Tabs component. Provide 4 tabs. Inside each tab, present information in a structured list with check icons or a grid format.

sections.name: Agenda Kegiatan
sections.details: List view of upcoming events. Each list item has a left-aligned distinct Date Badge (Day number large, Month short, e.g., '30 JUN' with gray bg and navy text). Right side contains Event Title, Time, and Location.

sections.name: Galeri Foto
sections.details: CSS Grid (grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4). Gapless or small gap grid of photos. `overflow-hidden rounded-xl` on container. Hover effect: image scales up slightly (`hover:scale-105`) with a dark gradient overlay.

sections.name: Video Profil
sections.details: Large 16:9 container with a thumbnail image. Dark overlay. Center-aligned large Play button (lucide Play icon inside a white glassmorphism circle). Text below 'Tonton Video Profil Kami'.

sections.name: Fasilitas
sections.details: 3-column grid of cards showcasing school facilities (Perpustakaan, Lab Komputer, Lapangan Olahraga, Tempat Ibadah). Image top, Title bottom.

sections.name: Testimoni
sections.details: Grid of cards (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3). Quote icon at top, feedback text, student/parent name, and role.

sections.name: PPDB CTA Section
sections.details: High-contrast section (Light blue `bg-[#EFF6FF]` or Navy). Large heading 'Penerimaan Peserta Didik Baru Tahun Ajaran 2026/2027'. 'Daftar Sekarang' button.

sections.name: Contact & Map
sections.details: Split layout. Left: Contact Information (Alamat, Telepon, Email) with icons + Simple Contact Form. Right: Placeholder iframe for Google Maps (use a gray box if iframe not available).

sections.name: Footer
sections.details: Dark Navy background (`bg-slate-900`). 4 columns: Brand info & Logo, Link Terkait (Kemdikbud, Dinas Pendidikan), Navigasi Cepat, Kontak & Sosmed. Copyright text at bottom border.

testing_rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute in kebab-case format based on their role (e.g., `data-testid="hero-ppdb-button"`, `data-testid="nav-profil-link"`).
